all.critique:
The analysis does a good job of covering the core responsibilities of the Trainer class, including setting up the optimizer, running the training loop with noise injection, computing the masked MSE loss, updating weights and the EMA model, and handling logging and checkpointing. However, there are a few points to note:

1. Device Management (Low Severity):  
   The analysis does not mention whether the Trainer moves models and data to the proper device (e.g., GPU). Even though this may be handle
